name: Apple Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine 1 3/4 cups of flour, 1/4 cup sugar, the baking powder, baking soda and salt.
2. In a small bowl, combine egg, milk, applesauce and butter; mix well.
3. Add egg mixture to flour mixture, stirring just until moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
4. In another small bowl, toss cranberries with 2 tablespoons flour; fold into batter.
5. Spoon batter into 12 greased 2 1/2 inch muffin cups.
6. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from pan and cool on a wire rack.
